title: vitis nortonii
intro: Vitis nortonii, also known as Norton grape, is a species of grapevine native to the United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Vitis nortonii include its potential to aid in the treatment of various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Vitis nortonii can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
